arts.ttl: Brest's 'magic' rise from amateur football to Champions League
arts.sum: Brest's rise from amateur football to the Champions League is "magic", but will they maintain a 100% start in Europe?

arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Stade Brest
arts.sum: The team sheets for this evening's UEFA Champions League duel between defending Bundesliga champions Bayer 04 Leverkusen and Ligue 1's Stade Brest are in. Leverkusen trainer Xabi Alonso has employed a whopping eight changes to the squad he last deployed in the league. The Werkself may line up in a 4-2-3-1.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen and Bayern Munich monitoring 1.FC Köln goalkeeper Jonas Urbig
arts.sum: Sport Bild reports that Bayer Leverkusen are monitoring the situation alongside Bayern Munich surrounding 1.FC Köln goalkeeper Jonas Urbig. It has previously been reported that Urbig is not interested in renewing…

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern and Leverkusen battle for highly-rated goalkeeper
arts.sum: According to Sport Bild, FC Köln's Jonas Urbig has attracted the interest of both Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich no longer the desired club for Bayer Leverkusen defender Jonathan Tah
arts.sum: Jonathan Tah flirted with the Bavarians over the summer, but the move never came to be, and now his options have grown: Jonathan Tah is still determined to leave Bayer Leverkusen on a free transfer next summer.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen predicted XI v Brest: Victor Boniface out, Martin Terrier to start
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen will be without Victor Boniface for their trip to face Stade Brestois in Brittany in the UEFA Champions League on Wednesday. The Nigeria international was involved in a…

arts.ttl: Brest predicted XI v Bayer Leverkusen: Pierre Lees-Melou to make first Champions League start
arts.sum: Having returned from an injury that had sidelined him since the end of last season, Pierre Lees-Melou is set to make his first-ever start in the UEFA Champions League proper. …

arts.ttl: Champions League predictions: Wednesday's Matchday 3 fixtures
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid tasted a shock 4-0 defeat to Benfica on Matchday 2 but should bounce back with victory against French side Lille on Wednesday. But Liverpool, Manchester City, Inter, Atletico Madrid and Bayer Leverkusen are among the other teams in action, with a few minnows hoping to cause an upset.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Erik ten Hag faces 'unhappy' boardroom as Xabi Alonso stance on job emerges
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag remains under intense pressure, with his Manchester United side now facing a crucial week, with matches in the Europa League, Premier League and Carabao Cup all upcoming

arts.ttl: Brest vs. Bayer Leverkusen: UEFA Champions League team news, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Leverkusen have enjoyed a perfect start on their return to the Champions League and begin Matchday 3 as one of seven teams with two wins from two after beating Feyenoord and AC Milan, while also not conceding a single goal. Bayer Leverkusen put their 100 percent UEFA Champions League record on the line as they visit French debutants Brest, who are also still perfect, on Wednesday (kick-off: 6.45pm CEST).
